Pulse 0.6.1

What's fixed:
- Automatic update detection now uses a build number newer than every previously published Pulse release, so Pulse 0.5.1 can correctly discover and install the 0.6 series.
- The release pipeline now rejects any build number that is not greater than the one already published in the Sparkle appcast.

This release includes all Longbridge SDK, index normalization, stable naming, settings persistence, and watchlist improvements introduced in Pulse 0.6.0.

No setup or account changes are required after updating.

For first-time installation, download Pulse-0.6.1.dmg and drag Pulse to Applications. The zip asset is used by Sparkle automatic updates.
